title: Slashing Meta CPAs by 42% for a Toronto-Based Skincare Brand via Fractional UGC
summary: How a scaling CPG brand moved away from high-gloss studio shoots to authentic, high-converting fractional UGC to bridge the trust gap in the Canadian market.
results: By pivoting to a fractional content strategy, the brand successfully lowered their customer acquisition costs by 42% and reclaimed their margins, allowing them to reinvest $15k/month back into top-of-funnel scaling.

title: The "Morning Scramble" Tax
summary: Why 'What should I post today?' is the biggest bottleneck to your first $100k.
